className: w-[480px] h-[240px] bg-slate-950 flex items-center justify-center

src: var parts = ctx.splitTextNode('title', { granularity: 'graphemes' }); var anims = ctx.stagger(parts.length, { from: { opacity: 0, translateY: 24, scale: 0.92 }, to: { opacity: 1, translateY: 0, scale: 1 }, duration: 18, gap: 2, easing: 'spring-gentle' }); for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) { parts[i].set({ opacity: anims[i].opacity, translateY: anims[i].translateY, scale: anims[i].scale }); }
